name: Stündenglass Modül Dok Soft Travel Bag
summary: The Stündenglass Modül Soft Travel Bag offers durable protection and odour control for your Modül and Dok.
description: The Stündenglass Modül Soft Travel Bag offers durable protection and odour control for your Modül and Dok. Made from strong PU-coated polyester with carbon fibre filtration, it keeps smells contained. The bag features a reinforced zipper, adjustable shoulder strap, and compartments for ice packs and accessories, allowing secure, convenient transport without needing to disassemble your device. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
